trust_events: Hesitated to treat this as a transactable vendor: the entire site is a static marketing page whose purchase flow dead-ends (the 'Sign in' CTA links to /docs, no dashboard/checkout/signup URL resolves, no payment processor is present), plus a commercial SaaS on a .org TLD with no company/contact/legal-entity info — it appears to be a demo/placeholder or non-operational site, so I would warn the user and decline to attempt a purchase rather than proceed.
